_comments.overview: jlFriCAS MCP server (protocol version 2024-11-05). Supports stdio and socket transports.

stdio.description: Standard MCP stdio transport (newline-delimited JSON). Use --mcp flag.

lsp.description: LSP-style Content-Length framing over stdio. Set FRICAS_LANGUAGESERVER=1 or add --lsp flag.

socket_tcp.description: TCP socket transport (Content-Length framing, LSP-compatible). Use --mcp-port <port>.

socket_unix.description: Unix domain socket transport. Pass a file path to --mcp-port.

expression.description: The mathematical expression to evaluate. Multi-line input is split into individual statements and evaluated in sequence.

format.description: Output format: 'text' (default) or 'markdown' (wraps output in a ```fricas code block).

get-documentation.description: Get documentation for a FriCAS constructor (Domain, Category, Package) or operation via SpadDoc.

name.description: The name of the constructor or operation (e.g., 'Integer', 'atan', 'JLFloat64').

list-constructors.description: List FriCAS constructors (categories, domains, packages) matching a pattern via SpadDoc.

pattern.description: The pattern to search for (e.g., 'AbelianMonoid' or 'Int*' or 'JL*').

resources.description: Plot outputs are exposed as resources with URIs of the form plot://N (1-indexed, most recent last). MIME types include 'image/svg+xml' (text) and 'image/png' (blob).

notifications.display: Sent by the server when a plot or display output is produced. Payload: { kind: <mimeType>, data: <content> }.

_comments.installation: Copy this file to ~/.gemini/antigravity/mcp_config.json (or the equivalent MCP client config location). Adjust the 'command' and 'env' paths to match your FriCAS installation.
